data.title: Live Updates: Latest from Israel, Iran, and the Middle East | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: Strait of Hormuz traffic falls to single digits • Kamala claims Netanyahu dragged Trump into Iran war • IRGC says it will target vessels in Hormuz, orders vessels to stay anchored
